delete-appointments.notes: Delete button on appointments page + calendar detail drawer with ConfirmModal

sidebar-reorganization.notes: 3 groups: Monitoring, Configuration IA, Mon business

feature-requests.notes: Full CRUD page + Supabase table bookbot_feature_requests

stats-invalidation.notes: invalidateAll() helper invalidates both appointmentKeys.all and statsKeys.all on create/update/delete

no-booking-mode.notes: Chatbot conversational mode when services.length === 0 — filters tools to knowledge+transfer only

services-data-sync.notes: CRITICAL FIX: useServices.ts now reads/writes bookbot_businesses.services JSONB instead of phantom 'services' table. Dashboard and chatbot now share same data source.

audit-webhook-security.notes: Meta signature verification (X-Hub-Signature-256) on all 3 webhooks (WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram). IdempotencyKey from message ID prevents duplicate triggers.

audit-race-conditions.notes: conversation_count: atomic RPC replaces read-modify-write. Reminders: queue concurrency=1 + conditional PATCH. Handler: retry maxAttempts=1.

audit-data-integrity.notes: client_phone nullable, pendingCount date filter, cancelActiveAppointment date guard, CalendarSkeleton position fix, supaHeaders extracted to shared module, GCal tokens no longer in logs.

audit-type-safety.notes: messenger/instagram added to source union type. Supabase client unified to singleton. Import @trigger.dev/sdk (not /v3). syncEnvVars removed. maxDuration 180s.

db-schema-audit.notes: Full DB schema vs code audit. Fixed: types/database.ts rewrite (hours/sector/owner_user_id/plan), onboarding column names + services JSONB, send-reminders phone_number_id/provider/human_phone, CreateAppointmentModal reminder_sent null, appointments/calendar Source type.

getutcday-timezone-fix.notes: ROOT CAUSE of wrong Wednesday slots. getDay() → getUTCDay() in trigger/src/utils/dates.ts and dashboard chat-test/route.ts. new Date('YYYY-MM-DD') parsed as UTC midnight, getDay() returns local TZ day.

chat-test-multirange.notes: chat-test/route.ts: rewrote slot generation to handle multi-range hours (08:00-12:00,13:00-17:00), added overlap detection, added end_time calculation.

reminder-sent-migration.notes: DB migration: reminder_sent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false → text nullable DEFAULT NULL. Supports null/24h/2h states.

next.context: Full audit complete including DB schema vs code alignment, getUTCDay timezone fix, multi-range hours parsing, reminder_sent migration. All deployed. Trigger v20260312.13. Pending: META_APP_SECRET env var in Vercel.

history.notes: Critical fix — dashboard was writing to wrong table
Meta signature + idempotencyKey on WhatsApp/Messenger/Instagram webhooks
Atomic RPC, reminder queue, handler no-retry
6 fixes: nullable phone, date filters, shared headers, skeleton position, GCal log leak
Source types, Supabase singleton, SDK import, syncEnvVars removed, maxDuration 180s
types/database.ts rewrite, onboarding fixes, send-reminders fixes
Root cause Wednesday bug: getDay→getUTCDay. Chat-test multi-range hours + overlap detection
Trigger.dev v20260312.13 (5 tasks) + Vercel vea.pacifikai.com. Messenger E2E test passed.
